name: Kerckhoff Coffeehouse
description: UCLA's first coffee house (est. 1975). Stunning gothic architecture. Sum One coffee, pastries, sandwiches, grilled cheese + soup. Tables with outlets along the pillars.
outlets_note: Outlets along the pillars — grab one early.
insider_note: Iconic spot but tables fill fast. The outdoor patio is less crowded and great in good weather.
